_doc: Baseline of GET endpoints currently flagged by scripts/check-org-isolation-coverage.ts as lacking a cross-org assertion in tests/api/organization-isolation.test.ts. Closing a gap (removing an entry) is fine. Adding a new uncovered endpoint without listing it here will fail tests/unit/check-org-isolation-coverage.test.ts so the gap is caught at PR time. See task #399 for the plan to drive this list to empty.
